segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm planning a dinner party and need to find a good bakery for desserts. Have you tried buttercup lane on sargeent street? I have, but it was disappointing. Smaller portions, higher prices and not as tasty. Did they get a new chef or change owners? Not that I know of, but they've replaced some longtime favorites like no more chocolate mousse cake. It was always a hit at my parties. That's too bad. A couple of my guests are picky about desserts, and one already asked what I'm serving. I'll need to keep looking.
